nasb.text: “So I also have made you despised and abased before all the people, just as you are not keeping My ways but are showing partiality in the instruction.

esv.text: and so I make you despised and abased before all the people, inasmuch as you do not keep my ways but show partiality in your instruction.”

cnv.text: 因此，我也使你們在眾人面前被藐視、受輕看，因為你們不遵守我的道，在律法上徇人的情面。”

ccb.text: “因此，我必使你们在众人面前遭藐视、轻贱。因为你们不遵守我的道，在教导上偏心待人。”

csbs.text: 因此我就使你们在万民面前被藐视、被轻贱，因为你们不谨守我的道路，在训诲上顾及人的情面。”
